vulnerability.reference: Users lack awareness that embeddings are invertible, leading to submission of sensitive text.
vulnerability.generated: Users lack control over embedding service API security, trusting black-box opacity that fails to prevent projection layer extraction.

impact.reference: Reconstructed personal communications expose individuals to identity theft and blackmail.
impact.generated: Sensitive user-submitted text is reconstructed from stolen embeddings, breaching confidentiality and leaking private data.

dose_response.reference: Black-box extraction enables embedding inversion, which in EaaS deployments exposes user-submitted text, leading to reconstructed personal communications and leaked trade secrets.
dose_response.generated: Black-box embedding projection layer extraction, through users submitting text to third-party services, triggers trust in API opacity that fails to prevent projection layer theft, leading to reconstruction of sensitive text that breaches confidentiality and leaks private data.
